action: Generate a realistic AI singing video using the selected avatar and a child-friendly singing script, obtain the conv_id, and save the conv_id with status 'pending' and a timestamp for tracking.
fallback_action: Retry video generation automatically if the process fails.

recipe.steps: Generate an original, child-friendly, rhyming singing script with appropriate timestamp formatting, an engaging introduction, <lyrics> section for 95 seconds, and an encouraging conclusion.

Use the Generate_video tool—provide the selected avatar_id and the complete singing script (including intro, <lyrics> section, and conclusion) to trigger the AI singing video generation and receive a conv_id.

Save the generated conv_id, set its status to 'pending', and capture the current timestamp by calling the save_data_in_memory tool under the singing_content.video_generation_status collection for later monitoring.
